# komodo_stack_restart (Action)

Triggers a `docker compose restart` on the target Komodo stack.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the stack to restart.

### Optional

- `services` (List of String) Filter to only restart specific services. If empty, restarts all services.
